_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Authorizing Official only: Approve authorization packages.
reference_document_element_description: Review and approve data access requests, data sharing agreements, and data use authorizations for data assets within the assigned domain.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-007 (RC, cosine: 0.361), RC-T-002 (RC, cosine: 0.352).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.572). Shared vocabulary: [approve]. DCWF-only terms [authorization, authorizing, official, only, packages] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, agreements, assets, assigned, authorizations, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.862, R=0.843). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Authorizing Official only: Approve authorization packages." and "Review and approve data access requests, data sharing agreements, and data use a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.420 < STS 0.572 (gap -0.153). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [authorization, authorizing, official] and [access, agreements, assets] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [approve]. DCWF-only: [authorization, authorizing, official, only, packages]. WIDAI-only: [access, agreements, assets, assigned, authorizations, data].
